purpose: Phase 0 baseline for the fully-local RTX-5080 fork. Two parts: (1) what was actually measured on the recon machine, and (2) the per-tier hardware targets from the brief, which MUST be re-measured on the real rig before they are trusted.

recon_machine.kind: CI / recon container (NOT the target machine)
recon_machine.note: No NVIDIA GPU and no Ollama here, so tokens/sec, VRAM split and energy CANNOT be measured. Code-level phases (1 config/factory/egress, 6 Rust DoS fix) are fully verifiable; GPU phases are scaffolded + documented for the rig.

test_suite.command: uv run pytest tests/ -q --continue-on-collection-errors -m 'not live and not cloud and not nvidia and not amd and not apple and not macos15 and not live_channel and not hub and not live_external and not modal and not docker and not slow'
test_suite.note: Zero code changed when this was captured, so every failure above is a pre-existing, missing-optional-dependency artifact of the recon container. The contract for later phases is: do not increase this count in the suites touched.

targets_to_remeasure_on_rig._comment: Starting targets from the build brief for an RTX 5080 (16 GB GDDR7) + 64 GB DDR5 under the default 'multitask' offload profile (~8-10 GB VRAM budget). NOT measured here. Re-run on the rig with nvidia-smi + ollama ps and overwrite the 'actual_*' fields. Speeds are tok/s, sizes/VRAM in GB.

idle.description: GPU free; models mostly/entirely on GPU

multitask.description: DEFAULT; light partial offload, ~6-8 GB left free

gaming.description: GPU busy; heavy offload or cpu-only

task_eval.reason: Task-success / latency / energy require a working local engine (Ollama + a pulled model) and the target GPU. The ~50-prompt personal-assistant suite (chat, multi-step reasoning, tool-use, RAG) must be run on the rig; use existing evals (openjarvis.evals) + tools/pearl-reference-oracle. Results land in the Phase 7 before/after report.
